episodes.title: Into the Wild
episodes.description: The crew launches their first expedition into the Canadian Rockies, facing unpredictable weather and terrain.

episodes.title: White Water
episodes.description: A roaring class-V river demands every ounce of skill and nerve as the team attempts a full traverse.

episodes.title: Summit Push
episodes.description: With supplies dwindling, the group makes a final push toward the peak through blinding snowfall.

episodes.title: Silent Forest
episodes.description: An overnight solo survival challenge sends each member into the deep woods alone.

episodes.title: Desert Crossing
episodes.description: The Sonoran Desert presents a brutal heat challenge during a 60-mile traverse in July.

episodes.title: Coastal Storm
episodes.description: A surprise Pacific squall pins the team to a sea cliff during a kayaking segment.

episodes.title: Canyon Run
episodes.description: Rappelling into the Grand Canyon tests the crew's rope skills and nerve at 800 feet.

episodes.title: Homeward
episodes.description: The final leg of the season — a 100-mile trek back to civilization with no GPS.

episodes.title: Patagonia
episodes.description: The team arrives at the tip of South America, facing one of the world's most unpredictable climates.

episodes.title: Ice Field
episodes.description: Crampons on, the crew navigates a massive glacial ice field as crevasses lurk beneath the snow.

episodes.title: Torres del Paine
episodes.description: The iconic granite towers of Chile demand a grueling multi-day scramble.

episodes.title: Raging Southern Ocean
episodes.description: A sailing segment through some of the roughest waters on Earth.

episodes.title: Condor Ridge
episodes.description: Following the flight path of the Andean condor leads to a hidden valley and a new route.

episodes.title: Journey's End
episodes.description: The team reflects on the season as they complete their final descent to the sea.

extras.title: Gear Deep Dive
extras.description: The full kit breakdown — what worked, what failed, and what they'd bring next time.

extras.title: Behind the Lens
extras.description: Cinematographer's cut — how they captured the most extreme footage.

extras.title: Season 3 Preview
extras.description: A quick look at the next destination: the jungles of Borneo.
